'''鈭歞h-k-v''' ('''dhakava''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:codiscover|codiscover]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-k-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:codiscover|codiscover]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-k-v
|-
! Lemma
| dhakava
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhakavithi|dhakavithi]] || [[word:dhakaviji|dhakaviji]] || [[word:dhakavishi|dhakavishi]] || [[word:dhakavi|dhakavi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhakavuthuth|dhakavuthuth]] || [[word:dhakavujuj|dhakavujuj]] || [[word:dhakavushush|dhakavushush]] || [[word:dhakav|dhakav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhakavuthu|dhakavuthu]] || [[word:dhakavuju|dhakavuju]] || [[word:dhakavushu|dhakavushu]] || [[word:dhakavu|dhakavu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhakavufuth|dhakavufuth]] || [[word:dhakavufuj|dhakavufuj]] || [[word:dhakavufush|dhakavufush]] || [[word:dhakavuf|dhakavuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhakavethe|dhakavethe]] || [[word:dhakaveje|dhakaveje]] || [[word:dhakaveshe|dhakaveshe]] || [[word:dhakave|dhakave]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhakavothoth|dhakavothoth]] || [[word:dhakavojoj|dhakavojoj]] || [[word:dhakavoshosh|dhakavoshosh]] || [[word:dhakav|dhakav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhakavotho|dhakavotho]] || [[word:dhakavojo|dhakavojo]] || [[word:dhakavosho|dhakavosho]] || [[word:dhakavo|dhakavo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhakavofoth|dhakavofoth]] || [[word:dhakavofoj|dhakavofoj]] || [[word:dhakavofosh|dhakavofosh]] || [[word:dhakavof|dhakavof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhakav忙th忙|dhakav忙th忙]] || [[word:dhakav忙j忙|dhakav忙j忙]] || [[word:dhakav忙sh忙|dhakav忙sh忙]] || [[word:dhakav忙|dhakav忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhakavathath|dhakavathath]] || [[word:dhakavajaj|dhakavajaj]] || [[word:dhakavashash|dhakavashash]] || [[word:dhakav|dhakav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhakavatha|dhakavatha]] || [[word:dhakavaja|dhakavaja]] || [[word:dhakavasha|dhakavasha]] || [[word:dhakava|dhakava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhakavafath|dhakavafath]] || [[word:dhakavafaj|dhakavafaj]] || [[word:dhakavafash|dhakavafash]] || [[word:dhakavaf|dhakavaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:dhakavasha|dhakavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:godhakavasha|godhakavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokidhakavasha|gokidhakavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhakavn眉sha|dhakavn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:godhakavnkn眉sha|godhakavnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokidhakavn眉sha|gokidhakavn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhakavsh毛sha|dhakavsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhakavnksh毛sha|godhakavnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhakavsh毛sha|gokidhakavsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhakavrosha|dhakavrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhakavnkrosha|godhakavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhakavrosha|gokidhakavrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhakavmusha|dhakavmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:godhakavnkmusha|godhakavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhakavmusha|gokidhakavmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:dhakavsherasha|dhakavsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:godhakavnksherasha|godhakavnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokidhakavsherasha|gokidhakavsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:dhakavngasha|dhakavngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:godhakavnkngasha|godhakavnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokidhakavngasha|gokidhakavngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhakavyasha|dhakavyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:godhakavnkyasha|godhakavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokidhakavyasha|gokidhakavyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:dhakavyamasha|dhakavyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:godhakavnkyamasha|godhakavnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokidhakavyamasha|gokidhakavyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhakavn眉sh毛sha|dhakavn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhakavnkn眉sh毛sha|godhakavnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhakavn眉sh毛sha|gokidhakavn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhakavn眉rosha|dhakavn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhakavnkn眉rosha|godhakavnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhakavn眉rosha|gokidhakavn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhakavn眉musha|dhakavn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhakavnkn眉musha|godhakavnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhakavn眉musha|gokidhakavn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhakavsh毛n眉sha|dhakavsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhakavnksh毛n眉sha|godhakavnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhakavsh毛n眉sha|gokidhakavsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhakavsh毛rosha|dhakavsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhakavnksh毛rosha|godhakavnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhakavsh毛rosha|gokidhakavsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhakavsh毛musha|dhakavsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhakavnksh毛musha|godhakavnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhakavsh毛musha|gokidhakavsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhakavron眉sha|dhakavron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhakavnkron眉sha|godhakavnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhakavron眉sha|gokidhakavron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhakavrosh毛sha|dhakavrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhakavnkrosh毛sha|godhakavnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhakavrosh毛sha|gokidhakavrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhakavromusha|dhakavromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhakavnkromusha|godhakavnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhakavromusha|gokidhakavromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhakavmun眉sha|dhakavmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhakavnkmun眉sha|godhakavnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhakavmun眉sha|gokidhakavmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhakavmush毛sha|dhakavmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhakavnkmush毛sha|godhakavnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhakavmush毛sha|gokidhakavmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhakavmurosha|dhakavmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhakavnkmurosha|godhakavnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhakavmurosha|gokidhakavmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:dhakav|dhakav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:dh忙k忙v|dh忙k忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hodhakav|hodhakav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hodh忙k忙v|hodh忙k忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodhakav|hohodhakav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodh忙k忙v|hohodh忙k忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉dhakav|n眉dhakav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉dh忙k忙v|n眉dh忙k忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉dhakav|n眉n眉dhakav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉dh忙k忙v|n眉n眉dh忙k忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂dhakav|n茂dhakav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂dh忙k忙v|n茂dh忙k忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂dhakav|n茂n茂dhakav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂dh忙k忙v|n茂n茂dh忙k忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:ludhakav|ludhakav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ludh忙k忙v|ludh忙k忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludhakav|luludhakav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludh忙k忙v|luludh忙k忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lidhakav|lidhakav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lidh忙k忙v|lidh忙k忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidhakav|lilidhakav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidh忙k忙v|lilidh忙k忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kodhakav|kodhakav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kodh忙k忙v|kodh忙k忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodhakav|kokodhakav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodh忙k忙v|kokodh忙k忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kedhakav|kedhakav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kedh忙k忙v|kedh忙k忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedhakav|kekedhakav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedh忙k忙v|kekedh忙k忙v]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==

[[Category:Word pages]]
